title: Add websocket heartbeat and graceful close handling
description: Keep the Gardena websocket healthy by sending client heartbeats and by completing the websocket close handshake more cleanly before reconnecting.
implementation:
1. Inspect the websocket loop and current reconnect behavior.
2. Add a periodic client ping while the websocket is open.
3. Handle close frames more gracefully so tungstenite can flush its reply before reconnecting.
4. Add or update tests for the new behavior.
5. Run formatting and tests.
